mapper.select:
SELECT t.ID AS id, t.STANDARD_CODE AS standardCode, t.STANDARD_NAME AS standardName, t.EQPT_ID AS eqptId, e.EQUIP_NAME AS eqptName, t.CREATE_BY AS createBy, t.CREATE_TIME AS createTime, t.UPDATE_BY AS updateBy, t.UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime FROM E_PATROL_STANDARD t LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_INFO e ON TO_CHAR(e.ID) = t.EQPT_ID AND e.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE 1 = 1
AND t.STANDARD_CODE LIKE '%' || #{standardCode} || '%'
AND t.STANDARD_NAME LIKE '%' || #{standardName} || '%'
ORDER BY t.CREATE_TIME DESC, t.ID DESC

SELECT t.ID AS id, t.STANDARD_CODE AS standardCode, t.STANDARD_NAME AS standardName, t.EQPT_ID AS eqptId, e.EQUIP_NAME AS eqptName, t.CREATE_BY AS createBy, t.CREATE_TIME AS createTime, t.UPDATE_BY AS updateBy, t.UPDATE_TIME AS updateTime FROM E_PATROL_STANDARD t LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_INFO e ON TO_CHAR(e.ID) = t.EQPT_ID AND e.DEL_FLAG = 0 WHERE t.ID = #{id}
SELECT PARENT_ID AS parentId, CHECK_CONTENT AS checkContent, QUALIFY_CONDITION AS qualifyCondition, CHECK_METHOD AS checkMethod FROM E_PATROL_STANDARD_SUB WHERE PARENT_ID = #{parentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_PATROL_STANDARD ( ID, STANDARD_CODE, STANDARD_NAME, EQPT_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{standardCode}, #{standardName}, #{eqptId}, #{loginUserId}, #{now}, #{loginUserId}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE E_PATROL_STANDARD SET STANDARD_CODE = #{standardCode}, STANDARD_NAME = #{standardName}, EQPT_ID = #{eqptId}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO E_PATROL_STANDARD_SUB ( PARENT_ID, CHECK_CONTENT, QUALIFY_CONDITION, CHECK_METHOD )
SELECT #{parentId}, #{item.checkContent}, #{item.qualifyCondition}, #{item.checkMethod} FROM dual
mapper.select: SELECT t.EQPT_ID AS "id", e.EQUIP_NAME AS "name" FROM E_PATROL_STANDARD t LEFT JOIN E_M_EQPT_INFO e ON TO_CHAR(e.ID) = t.EQPT_ID AND e.DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY t.ID DESC
